ResearchProjectDef.label: clozapine
ResearchProjectDef.description: Produce clozapine, a common antipsychotic medicine used to treat bipolar disorder and other mental conditions. It can help prevent some pawns from fully acting out impulsive behavior and extreme mental breaks. Large doses may cause vomiting.

ResearchProjectDef.label: morphine
ResearchProjectDef.description: Produce morphine, a derivative of opium poppy latex. This much stronger opioid also acts as a powerful painkiller, usually lasting 2 to 3 hours.

ResearchProjectDef.label: penicillin
ResearchProjectDef.description: Produce penicillin, one of the earliest effective medications for treating bacterial infections. Take once per day for maximum effect.

ResearchProjectDef.label: thornweed serum
ResearchProjectDef.description: Produce thornweed serum, the active numbing chemical found within thornweed needles, refined into a much more potent serum with fewer unwanted side effects.

ResearchProjectDef.label: tyrox
ResearchProjectDef.description: Produce tyrox, a medicine that vastly boosts the metabolism and therefore the immune response of any lifeform that injects it. Take once per day for maximum effect.

ResearchProjectDef.label: heroin
ResearchProjectDef.description: Produce heroin, a more potent and highly addictive morphine variant that delivers intense euphoria and heavy sedation. It usually lasts 4 to 5 hours and is extremely addictive.

ResearchProjectDef.label: joy
ResearchProjectDef.description: Produce joy, a drug developed by Urbworld governments to keep their citizens in check. It produces a strong euphoric high and is very addictive.

ResearchProjectDef.label: smelling salts
ResearchProjectDef.description: Produce smelling salts, also known as ammonia salts. They stimulate a creature's respiratory system by causing a reflex response to very small amounts of ammonia gas.

ResearchProjectDef.label: thornweed infusion
ResearchProjectDef.description: Produce thornweed infusion by processing raw thorns into thornweed needles.

ResearchProjectDef.label: peyote infusion
ResearchProjectDef.description: Produce peyote infusion by processing raw peyote into a psychoactive drug.

ResearchProjectDef.label: opium infusion
ResearchProjectDef.description: Produce opium infusion by processing raw opium into a usable drug ingredient.
